/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kde-notch.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/kde-notch.dir/main.cpp.o" -o kde-notch  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libLayerShellQtInterface.so.6.6.4 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
